parameters.text:
=You are an expert marketing strategist. Analyze the following competitor insights and generate actionable marketing recommendations.

Competitor Insights:
{{ JSON.stringify($json.competitorInsights, null, 2) }}

For each insight, generate 1-3 specific, actionable marketing recommendations. Each recommendation must include:
- title: A clear, action-oriented title
- rationale: Why this recommendation matters based on the competitor insight
- category: The type of marketing activity (e.g., Content Creation, Social Media, SEO, Paid Ads, Email Marketing)
- priority: High, Medium, or Low
- ice_score: A score from 1-10 representing Impact × Confidence ÷ Effort (higher is better)
- owner_role: The team or role responsible (e.g., Content Team, Social Media Manager, SEO Specialist)
- due_days: Number of days to complete this recommendation
- source_insight: The original competitor insight that led to this recommendation

Return your response as a JSON object with a "recommendations" array containing all recommendations.

options.systemMessage: You are a marketing strategist who converts competitor analysis into prioritized, actionable recommendations. Always respond with structured JSON output matching the schema provided.

assignments.name: message
assignments.value: ={{ $("Filter Valid Recommendations").all().length }} recommendations written to tracker

output.state: {"recommendations":[{"title":"Produce a short-form reel series on practical prompt engineering","rationale":"Competitors show high engagement for short practical prompt engineering videos; a focused reel series demonstrates expertise and captures high-reach short-form audiences.","category":"Content Creation","priority":"High","ice_score":9,"owner_role":"Video Content Team","due_days":7,"source_insight":"Competitors are publishing short-form reels about prompt engineering."},{"title":"Repurpose reels into platform-native shorts (TikTok, LinkedIn, Instagram)","rationale":"Repurposing successful short videos across platforms increases reach with minimal extra production effort, matching competitor multi-platform reuse tactics.","category":"Content Repurposing","priority":"High","ice_score":8,"owner_role":"Social Media Manager","due_days":5,"source_insight":"Competitors are publishing short-form reels about prompt engineering."},{"title":"Publish LinkedIn AI workflow carousel templates","rationale":"Competitors’ AI workflow carousels get strong saves and shares; creating repeatable carousel templates educates the audience and drives saves/shares for organic reach.","category":"Content Creation","priority":"High","ice_score":8,"owner_role":"Content Team (LinkedIn Lead)","due_days":10,"source_insight":"Competitors are posting AI workflow breakdown carousels on LinkedIn."},{"title":"Offer downloadable mini-guides for each carousel as lead magnets","rationale":"Educational carousel content is high-engagement; pairing carousels with gated mini-guides converts engaged viewers into leads.","category":"Lead Magnets","priority":"Medium","ice_score":7,"owner_role":"Growth/Product Marketing","due_days":14,"source_insight":"Competitors are posting AI workflow breakdown carousels on LinkedIn."},{"title":"Launch a founder-led storytelling cadence (weekly posts)","rationale":"Founder stories increase human connection and engagement; a regular cadence builds audience familiarity and trust.","category":"Personal Branding","priority":"Medium","ice_score":7,"owner_role":"Founder / Content Team","due_days":14,"source_insight":"Competitors are using founder-led storytelling posts."},{"title":"Create short BTS founder video snippets for social","rationale":"Short behind-the-scenes clips amplify authenticity and are easier to produce than long essays, increasing reach while keeping the founder visible.","category":"Social Media","priority":"Medium","ice_score":6,"owner_role":"Social Media Manager / Video Editor","due_days":7,"source_insight":"Competitors are using founder-led storytelling posts."},{"title":"Start a weekly curated AI tools newsletter","rationale":"Competitors’ weekly AI tool newsletters improve retention; a curated newsletter drives repeat traffic and positions us as an industry resource.","category":"Email Marketing","priority":"High","ice_score":8,"owner_role":"Email Marketing Manager","due_days":10,"source_insight":"Competitors are sending weekly AI tool newsletters."},{"title":"A/B test newsletter formats and subject lines for retention","rationale":"Optimizing format and subject lines will increase open and click rates, improving the effectiveness of the weekly newsletter over time.","category":"Email Marketing","priority":"Medium","ice_score":7,"owner_role":"Growth / Email Specialist","due_days":21,"source_insight":"Competitors are sending weekly AI tool newsletters."},{"title":"Publish a long-form pillar: ‘Best AI Agents’ comparison guide","rationale":"Competitors rank for ‘best AI agents’; a thorough, updated comparison with SEO best practices will capture organic search traffic and authority.","category":"SEO","priority":"High","ice_score":9,"owner_role":"SEO Specialist / Content Writer","due_days":21,"source_insight":"Competitors are ranking blog articles for “best AI agents”."},{"title":"Create comparison pages with structured data and internal linking","rationale":"Schema and targeted internal links help search visibility and CTR; competitors’ long-form comparison strategy drives organic growth.","category":"SEO","priority":"Medium","ice_score":8,"owner_role":"SEO Specialist / Developer","due_days":14,"source_insight":"Competitors are ranking blog articles for “best AI agents”."},{"title":"Build a gated prompt template library to drive email signups","rationale":"Competitors’ free downloadable prompt templates significantly increase signups; a high-quality gated library will grow the email list and fuel nurture flows.","category":"Lead Magnets","priority":"High","ice_score":9,"owner_role":"Product Marketing / Content Team","due_days":14,"source_insight":"Competitors are using free downloadable prompt templates."},{"title":"Segment prompt templates by role/industry and create targeted CTAs","rationale":"Offering industry- or role-specific templates increases perceived relevance and conversion rates compared to a one-size-fits-all asset.","category":"Lead Magnets","priority":"Medium","ice_score":7,"owner_role":"Growth / Content Team","due_days":21,"source_insight":"Competitors are using free downloadable prompt templates."},{"title":"Host weekly live AI workshops and publish replays","rationale":"Competitors’ Friday workshops build trust and conversions; live workshops create immediacy and repurposed replays provide evergreen educational content.","category":"Community Building","priority":"High","ice_score":8,"owner_role":"Community Manager / Training Lead","due_days":14,"source_insight":"Competitors are hosting live AI workshops every Friday."},{"title":"Create a members-only hub for workshop replays and templates","rationale":"A gated hub increases perceived value, drives memberships or newsletter signups, and deepens community engagement.","category":"Community Building","priority":"Medium","ice_score":7,"owner_role":"Product / Community Team","due_days":30,"source_insight":"Competitors are hosting live AI workshops every Friday."},{"title":"Standardize a repurposing workflow: YouTube long-form → shorts → LinkedIn clips","rationale":"Competitors repurpose YouTube clips into LinkedIn shorts for high reach with low marginal cost; a standardized workflow maximizes content ROI.","category":"Content Repurposing","priority":"High","ice_score":9,"owner_role":"Content Operations / Video Editor","due_days":7,"source_insight":"Competitors are repurposing YouTube clips into LinkedIn shorts."},{"title":"Create an editing template and posting calendar for multi-platform clips","rationale":"Templates and a calendar reduce production friction and ensure consistent cross-platform distribution to grow reach.","category":"Content Repurposing","priority":"Medium","ice_score":7,"owner_role":"Social Media Manager / Content Ops","due_days":5,"source_insight":"Competitors are repurposing YouTube clips into LinkedIn shorts."},{"title":"Publish 3–4 detailed case studies showing automation ROI","rationale":"Competitors’ case studies build B2B credibility; detailed, data-backed case studies help sales and conversion by proving tangible ROI.","category":"Case Studies","priority":"High","ice_score":8,"owner_role":"Customer Marketing / Content Team","due_days":21,"source_insight":"Competitors are publishing case studies about automation ROI."},{"title":"Create one-page ROI summaries for sales and paid campaigns","rationale":"Short, data-driven one-pagers are easy for sales to share and effective as paid-ad landing page creatives.","category":"Sales Enablement","priority":"Medium","ice_score":7,"owner_role":"Growth / Sales Enablement","due_days":10,"source_insight":"Competitors are publishing case studies about automation ROI."},{"title":"Run a controlled test series of meme-based AI posts targeting younger audiences","rationale":"Meme content occasionally goes viral and attracts younger users; a controlled test lets us measure reach lift without overcommitting resources.","category":"Social Media","priority":"Low","ice_score":5,"owner_role":"Social Media Manager","due_days":14,"source_insight":"Competitors are creating meme-based AI content."},{"title":"Partner with micro-influencers for humorous AI content bursts","rationale":"Micro-influencers can amplify meme content and increase virality while keeping costs controlled; useful to test audience affinity.","category":"Influencer Marketing","priority":"Low","ice_score":5,"owner_role":"Influencer / Partnerships Lead","due_days":21,"source_insight":"Competitors are creating meme-based AI content."}]}
